AI Tool Finder
Categories All Tools Compare

Best AI Writing Tools (2026)

Tools that help you draft, edit, and improve blog posts, emails, marketing copy, and long-form content.

ChatGPT by OpenAI

The most widely used AI chatbot for writing, research, coding help, and everyday questions.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available; Plus $20/mo; Pro $200/mo

Claude by Anthropic

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available; Pro $20/mo; Max plans from $100/mo

Jasper by Jasper AI

An AI writing platform built for marketing teams and brand-consistent content.

💲 Paid only — Plans start around $49/mo; no permanent free tier (free trial only)

Copy.ai by Copy.ai

AI copywriting tool focused on marketing content and workflow automation.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available; paid plans from $49/mo

Grammarly by Grammarly Inc.

AI-powered grammar, tone, and clarity checker with a generative writing assistant.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available; Premium from $12/mo

Notion AI by Notion Labs

AI features built directly into the Notion workspace for notes, docs, and databases.

💲 Paid only — Add-on from $8-10/user/mo on top of a Notion plan

AI Tool Finder — independent AI tool reviews and comparisons. Some links may be affiliate links, at no extra cost to you.
